# SuperDTP

> Enterprise document layout, localisation, and publishing infrastructure for global enterprises and publishers. Operating since 2014 with 60+ in-house specialists across production centres in Bulgaria and India.

SuperDTP delivers production-grade multilingual services spanning desktop publishing, Indic language localisation, eLearning adaptation, PDF accessibility compliance, prepress and typesetting, file preparation, and independent quality assurance. The company acts as a back-office for publishers worldwide and a localisation engine for enterprises expanding into Indian and global markets.

## Services

- [Indic Language Localisation](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/): Enterprise-grade localisation into Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Punjabi, Odia, and Assamese. Covers corporate documents, marketing collateral, product packaging, software UI, and all publication types. Uses an automated production DTP pipeline for scale.

- [Website & Digital Experience Localization](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/#website-localization), [Software, SaaS & App Localization](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/#software-app-localization), [Marketing & Brand Localization](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/#marketing-localization), [Technical & Business Document Localization](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/#technical-documentation-localization), [Multimedia & eLearning Localization](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/#multimedia-localization), [eLearning Localization](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/#elearning-localization), and [Localization QA & Testing](https://www.superdtp.com/localization/#localization-qa-testing) are all sub-services delivered under the Indic Language Localisation page.

- [Multilingual DTP Services](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/): Desktop publishing and layout design across 40+ languages including Indic, Asian (CJK), Middle Eastern (Arabic, Hebrew), and European scripts. Delivers print-ready PDFs for books, magazines, brochures, manuals, catalogues, and marketing materials. Supports InDesign, QuarkXPress, Illustrator, Photoshop, Publisher, and Word.

- [Multilingual DTP & Typesetting](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#multilingual-dtp), [Document Formatting & Corporate Publishing](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#document-formatting), [PDF Remediation & Accessible Documents](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#pdf-remediation), [Layout Recreation & File Conversion](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#layout-recreation), [Technical Documentation & eLearning DTP](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#technical-documentation), [Image, Graphics & Presentation Localization](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#image-graphics), [Translation File Engineering & Production Support](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#file-engineering), and [Print & Digital Publishing Services](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#print-publishing) are all sub-services delivered under the Multilingual DTP Services page.

- [PDF Accessibility & Remediation](https://www.superdtp.com/dtp-services/#pdf-remediation): Manual PDF remediation for full Section 508, WCAG 2.1/2.2, and ADA compliance. Accessibility specialists personally review every page — adding tags, reading order, alt-text, and document structure that automated tools cannot reliably produce.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2014
- Team: 60+ in-house specialists (not outsourced)
- Locations: Bulgaria and India
- Languages: 40+ including all Indic, European, CJK, and RTL scripts
- Software: InDesign, QuarkXPress, Photoshop, Illustrator, Corel, PageMaker, Word, Publisher, Visio
- Cost advantage: Up to 60% savings vs. in-house production
- Availability: 365 days/year, 24/7 schedule with prior booking
- Clients: Startups, SMEs, Fortune 500 and Fortune 1000 companies
